commit.message:
fix: community detail page field mismatches with backend API

- Avatar: authorAvatar → avatarUrl (posts and comments)
- Username: authorNickname/authorUsername → username
- Counts: likeCount → likesCount, commentCount → commentsCount
- Author ID: authorId → userId
- Reply: replyToNickname → replyToUsername
- Like API: {postId} → {targetType:'POST', targetId}
- Follow: check isFollowing field from getFollowStatus
- Images: handle backend JSON string format + imageUrls fallback
- Pagination: comments use 0-based page
- Remove non-existent viewCount from stats bar

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: resolve ImageTk compatibility issue on macOS

- Add _pil_to_tk_photo() helper to convert PIL Image via PPM format
- Replace ImageTk.PhotoImage with PPM-based workaround in _show()
- Remove unused ImageTk imports
- Add app.py as root-level entry point

The ImageTk module fails on uv-managed Python due to Tk library
mismatch between Pillow wheel and Python binary. Using PPM format
as intermediate bypasses the problematic _imagingtk extension.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: require explicit TextField text path binding to match button context

- system_prompt.py: instruct LLM to always include text: {path:...} in
  TextField definitions, matching the exact path in button actions context.
  This prevents the /fields/X/value vs /X/value mismatch that caused form
  submissions to send empty strings.

- FinancialCatalog.kt: add WARN log when TextField falls back to derived
  path, making mismatches immediately visible in Logcat.

- copilot-instructions.md: document the required server-side TextField
  path binding convention.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

debug: log exact path lookups in resolveActionContext

Shows key=X path=/Y/value → "Z" for every context entry so we can
confirm whether button context paths match TextField storage paths.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: add comprehensive copilot-instructions.md

Covers build commands, two-part architecture (Android + Python agent),
A2UI protocol data flow, FinancialCatalog override patterns, form data
binding conventions, Logcat tags, and the USE_REAL_AGENT toggle.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add FinancialCatalog debug logging for form data flow

Logs added to trace the full lifecycle of form values:
- TextField seeded: fires on composition for each field, shows path + initial value
- TextField changed: fires on each keystroke, shows path + new value
- Button onClick: fires on submit, shows action name + full resolved context

Filter in Logcat with tag: FinancialCatalog

Expected output on Save:
  Button[btn_save] firing action=submit_address_update
  Button[btn_save] context=street=123 Main St, city=New York, state=NY, ...

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test(cli): align quickstart verification with positional space paths

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: improve file upload reliability and error reporting

- Frontend nginx: add client_max_body_size 20m and proxy timeouts
  for API location to prevent upload failures through reverse proxy
- uploadFile: handle 401 with redirect to login, parse server error
  messages from response body, capture err.errMsg in fail callback

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: use /{componentId}/value as TextField storage path

Server button context references paths like /tf_street/value, /tf_city/value.
Previous code only derived paths for IDs starting with 'field_' → storagePath
was null for all tf_X components → DataContext never written → context missing
from submit event.

Fix: always store at /{componentId}/value when no explicit text path binding
is provided. This matches the server's convention and the button context
path references exactly.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add OAuth proxy endpoints to strip resource param for Entra compatibility

The MCP SDK (RFC 8707) sends resource=<server-origin> to the authorization
and token endpoints. Entra ID rejects this with AADSTS9010010 when the
resource doesn't match the scope audience (api://client-id).

Fix: Cloudflare Worker now proxies /oauth/authorize and /oauth/token,
stripping the resource parameter before forwarding to Entra. The
authorization_endpoint and token_endpoint in OAuth server metadata now
point to the Worker instead of Entra directly.

- /oauth/authorize: strips resource, 302 redirects to Entra auth endpoint
- /oauth/token: strips resource, proxies POST to Entra token endpoint
- Protected resource metadata resource field stays as origin (satisfies
  SDK's checkResourceAllowed validation)
- All three clients (VS Code, Claude Code, Open Code) now authenticate

Also update docs/11-readonly-mcp-setup.md architecture diagram and add
AADSTS9010010 troubleshooting section.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: always send form context on button submit

Two root causes fixed:

1. TextField now seeds DataContext on first composition via LaunchedEffect.
   Previously, dataContext.update() only fired in onValueChange, so fields
   never modified by the user had no entry in DataContext. Button would then
   find null at all paths and silently drop the entire context object.

2. resolveActionContext now returns JsonPrimitive("") for paths that resolve
   to null, instead of excluding those keys. This ensures the context object
   is always included in the UserActionEvent even if some fields are empty.
   Cancel button (context=[]) still correctly produces null context.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- photoRecognize: /food/photo-recognize → /food-recognition/recognize-by-image
- recognizeByName: /food/recognize-by-name → /food-recognition/recognize-by-name
- Upload field name: 'file' → 'image' to match backend @RequestParam

fix: wire form field values to button submit context

Three bugs fixed:

1. Button reads 'actions' array (not 'action') and 'style' string (not 'primary'
   bool) to match the actual server payload format.

2. resolveActionContext() now handles the flat context entry format the server
   sends: {key, path} where path is a string directly on the entry, in addition
   to the nested {key, value: {path}} legacy format.

3. TextField derives its DataContext storage path from the component ID when the
   server sends no 'text' binding: 'field_state' -> '/form/state'. This matches
   the paths the button's submit context references, so typed values are present
   in DataContext when Save is tapped.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: apply designer form specs — green focus borders, column spacing property, button refinements

- Color.kt: add FormFieldBackground (#F9FAFB) and FormFieldBorder (#D0D5DD) tokens
- TextField: unfocused container → off-white FormFieldBackground; unfocused border →
  FormFieldBorder (more visible); focused border → PositiveGreen (brand green, not blue);
  cursor → PositiveGreen; error cursor → NegativeText
- Column: parse optional 'spacing' property — 'form'=16dp, 'fieldGroup'=4dp, else=2dp
  (backward-compatible: existing transaction rows with no spacing param unchanged)
- Button primary: heightIn(min=52dp) instead of fixed height; container → PositiveGreen
- Button secondary: full-width TextButton with PositiveGreen text color, 52dp min height
- Remove unused Primary and CardBorderSubtle imports

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Fidelity-style form UX — TextField and Button overrides

TextField (financialTextFieldWidget):
- RoundedCornerShape(8dp) matching Fidelity reference
- Suppressed floating label (server sends separate Text label above field)
- Label repurposed as placeholder hint in OnSurfaceMuted gray
- Focus border: Primary blue; unfocused: CardBorderSubtle
- 52dp minimum height for comfortable touch targets
- White container background (unfocused and focused)
- Error state uses NegativeText red border

Button (financialButtonWidget):
- primary=true  → full-width (fillMaxWidth), 52dp height, 8dp corners,
                  PositiveText green container, white SemiBold label
- primary=false → TextButton style (text-only, for Cancel/secondary actions)
- Preserves full action.context resolution so form submissions pass
  all bound field values to the server

resolveActionContext() helper reimplements ButtonWidget's context
resolution using public DataContext API only (no library internals).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: switch to Firebase Messaging for FCM tokens

@capacitor/push-notifications returns raw APNs tokens on iOS which
FCM rejects. @capacitor-firebase/messaging returns proper FCM tokens
that work with admin.messaging().send().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix Spotify token refresh to prevent 401s after ~1 hour (#5)

* Initial plan

* Fix Spotify token expiration: auto-refresh tokens before they expire

- Add periodic token refresh interval (every 50 min) in page.tsx
- Use accessTokenRef in SpotifyPlayerProvider so getOAuthToken callback
  always returns the latest token instead of a stale closure value
- Remove accessToken from player init effect deps to avoid reconnecting
  the player on token refresh

commit.message:
fix: register push listeners before calling register()

The registration event could fire before the listener was attached,
causing the token to be silently lost. Now:
- Remove existing listeners first (prevent duplicates)
- Attach all listeners BEFORE calling register()
- Added logging for successful token registration

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(qdrant): add purge_expired() and optional GC thread (OBSCURA_QDRANT_ENABLE_GC=1)

commit.message:
Fix citation errors and add missing references in Native_AI_Physical_Layer_6G_IEEE.md

- Remove duplicate/contradictory note in Section II that incorrectly attributed [21] to Kingma & Ba (Adam) instead of Richardson & Urbanke
- Fix Adam optimizer citation: [21] → [13] (Kingma & Ba 2015, newly added)
- Fix RNN/LSTM citation: [19] (Hornik et al. UAT paper) → [98] (Hochreiter & Schmidhuber 1997, newly added)
- Fix Transformer citation: [20] (Mhaskar & Poggio approximation theory) → [99] (Vaswani et al. 2017, newly added)
- Fix PHY constraints citation: [7] (LeCun et al. general DL overview) → [9] (O'Shea & Hoydis 2017)
- Add missing reference [13]: Kingma & Ba, Adam optimizer, ICLR 2015
- Add missing reference [42]: O'Shea, Karra & Clancy, channel auto-encoders, ISSPIT 2016
- Add missing reference [44]: O'Shea, Roy & Clancy, radio signal classification, IEEE JSTSP 2018
- Add new reference [98]: Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, LSTM, Neural Computation 1997
- Add new reference [99]: Vaswani et al., Attention is all you need, NeurIPS 2017
- Update abstract reference count: ~78 refs (2017-2023) → ~99 refs (1948-2025)
- Correct overstatement about autoencoder vs Polar code performance to reflect actual literature

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: eastaizah <258072108+eastaizah@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(Section-III-A-7): address review comments

- Clarify M=16 => k=4 and M=256 => k=8 in constellation bullet
- Split long autoencoder bullet into architecture and computational
  constraints sub-bullets for readability
- Expand 'no conv.' abbreviation to 'no convergence' in table cells
  and preamble sentence
- Replace misleading 'lower bound' wording with 'under-optimized
  autoencoder performance attributable to resource constraints'

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: eastaizah <258072108+eastaizah@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: register push notifications on fresh login

Push token registration only happened on app reload with existing
session. Now also triggers after OTP login so new sessions get
push notifications immediately.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(Section-III-A-7): correct experimental data, table II, and analysis

- Figure 3: fix parameters to n=64,k=8,R=1/8,M=256; reference actual
  figure file (experiments/figures/figure3.png); correct performance
  description (Polar SC outperforms autoencoder, not the reverse)
- Experimental setup: replace single rate R=1/2 with actual varying
  rates {4/7, 1/2, 1/4, 1/8}; correct (n,k) pairs; replace SC-List L=8
  with basic SC decoder; add CPU training constraint note (3-4.5 s,
  20k-59k parameters); add LDPC design-regime mismatch note
- Table II: replace all fabricated values with actual JSON data;
  add correct column headers with (n,k,R); mark non-convergence
  entries as >12 dB; correct PPV bound values; add N/A for missing
  LDPC/Turbo reference data at n=32
- Results analysis: rewrite to honestly report autoencoder
  non-convergence for n>=16 and 7.65 dB gap at n=7; explain gap
  as under-training artifact (CPU, ~4 s) not capacity limitation;
  cite O'Shea & Hoydis [9] and Dorner et al. [10] for GPU-scale
  competitive results
- Fix k=3.5 non-integer to k=4 throughout
- Remove M=2^32 (infeasible) and replace with M=2^8=256 throughout
- Add statistical confidence note re IEEE frame-error minimums
- Add LDPC fairness note (n=648 designed for long blocks)
- Correct decoder label SC-List L=8 to basic SC everywhere

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: eastaizah <258072108+eastaizah@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: correct support email to hello@slanup.com

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: add capacitor-native class via JS for CSS scoping

Capacitor doesn't add plt-capacitor class when loading remote URLs.
Instead, initNativeUI() adds 'capacitor-native' to <html> so CSS
can scope native-only styles reliably.

[ruby/strscan] Implement StringScanner for TruffleRuby in pure Ruby
(https://github.com/ruby/strscan/pull/195)

* Fixes https://github.com/ruby/strscan/issues/194.
* This is a fresh new implementation from scratch, contributed directly
to ruby/strscan, under BSD-2-Clause.
This was implemented using the strscan tests, specs from ruby/spec and
the documentation
(https://docs.ruby-lang.org/en/master/StringScanner.html).
* lib/strscan.rb now handles the loading for all implementations.
* Test on TruffleRuby 33 to ensure it keeps working on older TruffleRuby
releases,
which do not have the necessary Primitives used by this new
implementation.

---------

https://github.com/ruby/strscan/commit/3908e0ddb0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Treasury: Low Balance Warning UI + Bounty Bot Pause Switch + Admin Email Alert (#225)

* Initial plan

* feat: treasury health indicator, bounty bot pause toggle, and email alert

- Create bounty-bot-config.json (file-based bot pause flag)
- Update bounty-bot.yml: check config, post pause message, send email alert when paused
- Update index.html: treasury health indicator + admin-only bot pause toggle
- Update app.js: color-coded thresholds, reminder links, settle button disabled when insufficient
- Update css/styles.css: styles for health indicator and bot toggle switch

commit.message:
fix: comprehensive native layout — safe areas top to bottom

- StatusBar overlaysWebView: true — WebView extends behind status bar,
  safe areas handled purely in CSS (eliminates black line)
- html background set to white so status bar area matches
- Remove -webkit-user-select: none (was breaking text input)
- Add safe-top to profile page header
- Feed FAB uses calc() with safe-area-inset-bottom
- Feed main content padded for safe area bottom
- Plan page main padded with calc() for CTA bar + safe area
- Create page bottom padding uses safe area calc
- My-plans tabs moved inside sticky header (no hardcoded top offset)

commit.message:
feat: 支援纹章发动时机验证与提示

- 攻击型纹章仅在进攻方翻出时生效，防御型仅在防御方翻出时生效
- 时机不符时显示明确提示信息（纹章名、类型、翻出方）
- 新增 9 项纹章发动时机烟测用例

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: strengthen README intro — agentic AI framing, visibility gap, clear value

- Replace 'for ML engineers' with the real problem: teams building agentic AI
  and RAG-powered features are flying blind — no evaluation, no traceability,
  no visibility into which retrieval signals contribute
- Reframe PolyRAG as the tool that solves that gap before shipping to production
- Tagline: 'Stop guessing. Start knowing exactly why your RAG works — or doesn't.'
- 4 capability bullets rewritten to emphasise the outcome (evidence, data,
  traceability) not just the feature name

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: PolyRAG
repository.description: Multi-backend RAG framework — 12 retrieval methods, 6 vector stores, 11-phase pipeline. FastAPI + React + unified /api/rag agentic endpoint.

commit.message:
feat: switch to OTP auth, remove deep link workarounds

- Replace magic link 'check your email' with inline OTP input
- 6-digit code entry with auto-advance, paste support, auto-submit
- Add verifyOtp API method
- Remove deepLinks.ts, custom URL scheme, AASA, intent filters
- Revert verify page to simple legacy token handler (web only)
- Clean up vercel.json, Info.plist, App.entitlements, AndroidManifest

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: rewrite README from scratch with professional structure

- Lead with the engineering value proposition (experiment, compare, measure)
- Dedicated sections for each workbench tool: Search Lab, Comparison Matrix,
  Evaluation Studio, Ingestion Studio, Knowledge Graph Explorer
- Search Lab: explains Retrieval Trace Panel, A/B Config Testing, React Flow DAG,
  and all 12 retrieval methods grouped by type
- Comparison Matrix: explains cross-backend scoring, metrics, export
- Evaluation Studio: explains ground-truth workflow, quality metrics, RAGAS
- Clean retrieval pipeline table: all 12 methods with LLM dependency and defaults
- LLM config table: all 7 providers with graceful degradation explained
- Vector backends table: run modes, cloud options, native hybrid support
- Full REST API endpoint reference with request/response examples
- Configuration reference: all major config keys with inline comments
- Python API section with practical code examples and access control
- Test coverage: 443 tests by area, no internal phase references
- Technology stack: comprehensive library table with links
- Removed: Project Structure dump, internal phase numbering, stale
  LM Studio references, Backlog/Pending sections, 'Phase 13' heading

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: PolyRAG
repository.description: Multi-backend RAG framework — 12 retrieval methods, 6 vector stores, 11-phase pipeline. FastAPI + React + unified /api/rag agentic endpoint.
